{'reasoning': 'Assuming you mean the **leaf nodes** after all 8 splits (depth order: [Z,X,Y,Z,X,Y,Z,X]), a leaf path is b0…b7. It is landlocked iff its interval is strictly inside (0,1) on all axes, which (with dyadic halving splits) is equivalent to:\n- Z-bits (b0,b3,b6) are not 000 and not 111\n- X-bits (b1,b4,b7) are not 000 and not 111\n- Y-bits (b2,b5) are not 00 and not 11 (i.e. 01 or 10)\nThe 72 landlocked leaf-node paths are:', 'nodes': ['00000111', '00100011', '00001110', '00101010', '00001111', '00101011', '01000110', '01100010', '01000111', '01100011', '01001110', '01101010', '00010101', '00110001', '00011100', '00111000', '00011101', '00111001', '01010100', '01110000', '01010101', '01110001', '01011100', '01111000', '00010111', '00110011', '00011110', '00111010', '00011111', '00111011', '01010110', '01110010', '01010111', '01110011', '01011110', '01111010', '10000101', '10100001', '10001100', '10101000', '10001101', '10101001', '11000100', '11100000', '11000101', '11100001', '11001100', '11101000', '10000111', '10100011', '10001110', '10101010', '10001111', '10101011', '11000110', '11100010', '11000111', '11100011', '11001110', '11101010', '10010101', '10110001', '10011100', '10111000', '10011101', '10111001', '11010100', '11110000', '11010101', '11110001', '11011100', '11111000']}
